persona.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Clinical Trust meets Ancient Wisdom.

theme.description: A foundation of clinical white and soft warm greys, accented by deep herbal greens and earthy wood tones to signify 'Nature-based Medicine'. Avoids sterility.

primary.description: Deep Herbal Green - Used for primary buttons, active states, and key branding.

secondary.description: Pale Mint - Used for secondary buttons, backgrounds of active items.

accent.description: Warm Earth/Wood - Used for 'Ayurveda' specific highlights and warmth.

background.description: Pure white for content, Warm Stone (#FAFAF9) for page backgrounds.

text.description: Dark Jungle Green instead of pure black for softer contrast.

rules: Use 'Playfair Display' ONLY for editorial quotes or 'Wisdom' sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2F5C3E] text-white hover:bg-[#244A30] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8F3EA] text-[#2F5C3E] hover:bg-[#D1E5D6] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#2F5C3E] text-[#2F5C3E] hover:bg-[#E8F3EA] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 p-4 transition-all hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:border-[#2F5C3E]/20
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl aspect-square flex items-center justify-center bg-[#FAFAF9] group cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#E8F3EA] transition-colors
cards.doctor: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 p-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center transition-all hover:shadow-lg

inputs.search: h-12 w-full rounded-full border-slate-200 bg-white px-6 shadow-sm focus:border-[#2F5C3E] focus:ring-[#2F5C3E] transition-all text-lg placeholder:text-slate-400

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-slate-100 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

bento_grid.description: Use for Categories and Features. Asymmetric grid to create visual interest.

product_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4

hero.usage: Hero Section Background or Side Image

general: Follow the 'Herbal Clinical' theme strictly. No neon greens.
Use 'Manrope' (via Google Fonts or local) for Headings. If not available, use system sans-serif but bold.
Ensure all images have 'alt' tags for accessibility.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the category section on the homepage.
components: Do NOT use default Shadcn buttons. Override with the rounded-full styles defined in 'components.buttons'.
Customize the Shadcn 'Card' to remove the heavy border and add a soft shadow.
Search Bar must be prominent (Healthmug style) in the Hero section.

pages.homepage: Hero with Search + Trust Signals -> Shop by Concern (Circle Grid) -> Shop by System (Bento) -> Featured Products -> Doctor CTA.
pages.product_listing: Sidebar Filter (Sticky) + Grid of Products. Clean, no clutter.
pages.doctor_profile: Clean profile header, available slots as pill buttons, reviews section.

animations.rules: Use gentle fade-ins (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0) for sections. No aggressive bouncing.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
